mission.title: notary-project: notation sign doesn't work on main branch
mission.description: notation sign doesn't work on main branch. Community-reported issue.

steps.title: Identify notary-project troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your notary-project deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n notary-project -l app.kubernetes.io/name=notary-project
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=notary-project -n notary-project --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue.

steps.title: Review notary-project configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant notary-project configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n notary-project -l app.kubernetes.io/name=notary-project
kubectl get configmap -n notary-project -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=notary-project
```
**Summary**
notation sign doesn't work on main branch

- Build notation binary from main branch
- Follow the flow in https://github.com/notaryproject/notation/blob/main/docs/hello-signing.md
- Execute notation cert generate-test to create local keys

steps.title: Apply the fix for notation sign doesn't work on main branch
steps.description:
Tested with the workflow mentioned in [hello-signing](https://github.com/notaryproject/notation/blob/main/docs/hello-signing.md)
```yaml
notation sign --plain-http $IMAGE
Incorrect Usage: flag provided but not defined: -plain-http
```

steps.title: Confirm notation sign doesn't work on main branch is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=notary-project -n notary-project --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n notary-project --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that the issue symptoms are gone.

resolution.summary: Tested with the workflow mentioned in [hello-signing](https://github.com/notaryproject/notation/blob/main/docs/hello-signing.md)
codeSnippets:
notation sign --plain-http $IMAGE
Incorrect Usage: flag provided but not defined: -plain-http

notation cert generate-test --default "yizha-test-certs"
notation sign $IMAGE
2022/07/22 17:05:20 certificate-chain is invalid, certificate chain must contain at least two certificates: a root and a leaf certificate

./notation --version
notation version v0.7.1-alpha.1+bb5b49728798376a518b522f1693cf29b0376fa6.unreleased

$ ./notation sign --plain-http $IMAGE
Incorrect Usage: flag provided but not defined: -plain-http

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with notary-project installed or the issue environment reproducible.
